market_context: X/Twitter shows bearish equity sentiment with VIX spike and 5-day index drops dominating feeds; pre-market futures point to mixed open amid high 10Y yield. Crypto positive with BTC/ETH gains noted in threads. No major events flagged but options flow indicates defensive positioning.

predictions.reasoning: Recent 3.7% 5-day drop and VIX at 20.87 suggest oversold bounce; X chatter on support levels at 725 aligns with historical rebound patterns post VIX spikes.
Tech names like NVDA and MSFT under pressure from yield at 4.51%; X sentiment highlights continued rotation out of growth stocks.
EV sector mentions on X turning less negative; crypto correlation with BTC up 3.3% may lift TSLA in volatile session.
